---
title: "The Rt. Rev. Alexander Penrose Forbes"
---

## The Rt. Rev. Alexander Penrose Forbes

**Dates:** (1817-8 October 1875)

### Description

Bishop of Brechin

### Biography

He was made bishop in 1847,  and attempted to bring about reunion with Rome.  This was unpopular in Scotland and he was tried in 1860, Keble being present.  He was a friend of Gladstone [J.B.Mowat, <i>Bishop A.P. Forbes</i>; ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 24th [1875][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Aug 7th [?1874[[footnote:1]]]
- Letter from August 9. [1869]
- Letter from April 6, 1866

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
